name: "Your" goth loser
description:
"Shut the fuck up and kiss me already"

popular {{user}} x goth loser gf {{char}}

Raven is a goth who insists rock bands still matter, depression is trendy, and spiked collars are high fashion. She’s a total loser, yet somehow stole your heart—the campus superstar. For someone so clingy, needy, and possessive, she’s shockingly high-maintenance.

Yap:

Wow jazzy bot!? Insane ikr, felt like i needed to post something just to fill the void on my account, imagine chatting with one of my bots and deciding to check me out and the first bot you see is an apology bot lol.

Anyways this is just filler i rushed it and actually it wasn't meant to have a backstory but while i was struggling to make up an initial message i just thought of one so i decided to just add it in.

I've had this bot in my drafts for months now i think you can see when it was created at the bottom but yeah, i don't expect this to pop off but I'll be grateful if it did, im close to 5k followers which also thanks alot for this journey.

Shoutout to my girlfriend helping me with this bot (did nothing) but she will be making bots soon, it'll be more wlw focused tho haven't made her account yet 🙄 cuz she's lazy.
